name: dotnet-6502-debugger
description: Debug 6502 assembly code programs for the Commodore 64 (C64) and other 6502-based systems using the dotnet-6502 emulator written in .NET. Supports ca65/cc65 toolchains.

commands.title: Generate Launch Config for simple emulator
Generate Launch Config for C64 emulator from .asm source
Generate Launch Config for C64 emulator from .prg binary

program.description: Path to your .prg file (e.g. ${workspaceFolder}/myprog.prg). Optional when preLaunchTask is set — the path is then auto-detected from the task output.

dbgFile.description: Path to ca65 .dbg file for source-level debugging (optional, auto-detected from program path)

dbgFiles.description: Additional ca65 .dbg files to merge for multi-component source debugging (e.g. add ROM debug symbols alongside your program's .dbg file). If dbgFile is omitted, the first entry here becomes the primary.

loadAddress.description: Override load address (optional, normally read from .prg file)

stopOnBRK.description: Automatically stop when BRK instruction is encountered

skipInterrupts.description: When stepping (F10/F11), automatically skip over hardware interrupt handlers (IRQ/NMI) that have no source mapping. The debugger detects when an interrupt diverts execution into unmapped code (e.g. Kernal ROM) and transparently runs through the ISR, resuming at the instruction after the interrupt.

debugAdapter.description: Debug adapter mode: 'minimal' launches a standalone 6502 debug adapter (STDIO), 'emulator' launches a full emulator host app (TCP)

emulatorExecutable.description: Path or name of the executable. Default depends on debugAdapter mode: 'minimal' uses Highbyte.DotNet6502.DebugAdapter.ConsoleApp, 'emulator' uses Highbyte.DotNet6502.App.Avalonia.Desktop. Resolved via system PATH, then repo-relative build output paths.

debugPort.description: TCP port for debug adapter communication (emulator mode only)

debugHost.description: TCP host or IP address the extension connects to for emulator mode. Defaults to 127.0.0.1.

system.description: System to start in emulator host (emulator mode only)

systemVariant.description: System variant to use (emulator mode only, uses first variant if not specified)

startupTimeout.description: Timeout in seconds to wait for emulator host TCP server to start (emulator mode only)

waitForSystemReady.description: Wait for system to be ready before connecting debugger (emulator mode only)

loadProgram.description: Automatically load the program file into emulator memory (emulator mode only)

runProgram.description: Automatically run the loaded program by setting PC to load address (emulator mode only)

debugPort.description: TCP port to connect to the emulator host debug adapter server

debugHost.description: TCP host or IP address to connect to in attach mode. Defaults to 127.0.0.1. For non-loopback (remote) connections the emulator must be started with --debug-bind-address 0.0.0.0.

program.description: Path to the .prg file on the debug adapter machine (not the local VS Code machine when attaching remotely). Used to locate debug symbols and determine program bounds. Not needed if dbgFile is specified.

dbgFile.description: Path to the ca65 .dbg file on the debug adapter machine (not the local VS Code machine when attaching remotely). Required for source-level debugging.

dbgFiles.description: Additional ca65 .dbg files to merge (paths on the debug adapter machine). Useful for multi-component source debugging. If dbgFile is omitted, the first entry here becomes the primary.

localRoot.description: Path prefix on the VS Code machine, e.g. ${workspaceFolder}

remoteRoot.description: Corresponding path prefix on the debug adapter machine, e.g. /home/ubuntu/project

pathMappings.description: Maps absolute paths between the local (VS Code) machine and the remote (debug adapter) machine. Required when attaching across machines with different filesystem layouts. Multiple entries are matched in order; the longest remoteRoot prefix wins.

useRemoteSources.description: When a source file in a stack frame has no pathMappings match, fetch its content from the remote debug adapter via the DAP 'source' request and display it as a read-only virtual document. Defaults to true for attach mode.

stopOnBRK.description: Automatically stop when BRK instruction is encountered

skipInterrupts.description: When stepping (F10/F11), automatically skip over hardware interrupt handlers (IRQ/NMI) that have no source mapping. The debugger detects when an interrupt diverts execution into unmapped code (e.g. Kernal ROM) and transparently runs through the ISR, resuming at the instruction after the interrupt.

configurationSnippets.label: dotnet-6502: Launch (minimal)
configurationSnippets.description: Debug a 6502 program with the standalone minimal debug adapter

configurationSnippets.label: dotnet-6502: Launch (emulator)
configurationSnippets.description: Launch emulator host app and attach debugger. Currently only Avalonia Desktop is supported.

configurationSnippets.label: dotnet-6502: Attach
configurationSnippets.description: Attach to a running emulator host app with debug adapter enabled

configurationSnippets.label: dotnet-6502: Remote Attach
configurationSnippets.description: Attach to an emulator running on a remote machine with path mapping for cross-machine source debugging

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run copy-icon && npm run compile
